title: Overhead View of Colorful Plant-Based Meal Prep in Glass Containers
description: Square overhead shot of vibrant plant-based meal prep featuring six glass containers filled with fresh vegetables, grains, legumes, and herbs arranged on a wooden kitchen counter. Bright natural daylight illuminates the clean composition, highlighting a variety of colorful ingredients including cherry tomatoes, broccoli, asparagus, chickpeas, tofu, kale, carrots, cucumbers, and leafy greens. The scene includes wooden spoons, small bowls with lime and parsley, and stainless steel water bottles, emphasizing a healthy, organized meal preparation setup.
